seed_expert_discoveries.project: LangChain Open Source Models & Memory Launch
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Partnership with NVIDIA for NemoClaw DeepAgents blueprint pairing open-source model-agnostic harness with Nemotron 3; new OpenWiki version for proactive personal brains from sources like Gmail; emphasizes owning full stack from model to context level.
Open-source agentic harness for internal coding/automation, model-agnostic, integrates with LangSmith for observability; alternative to closed internal agents at companies like Sierra/Ramp.
Agent memory shifted from reactive to proactive via OpenWiki: connect sources, specify interests, agents start with context; open-source with local config and architecture details.
Default user approval for tool calls in coding agents; options for expanded permissions; hooks documentation for advanced agent control.
